monitor.capture_what: the file path argument passed to open(), revealing path traversal

oracle_check.condition_description: The path passed to open() contains path traversal sequences (../) or absolute paths pointing outside the cache directory, confirming unsanitized user input reaches the file sink
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PATH_INJECTION: unsanitized path traversal reached file sink — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

_meta.function_signature: def postprocess_image(format: str, value: np.ndarray | PIL.Image.Image | str | Path | None, cache_dir: str, watermark: WatermarkOptions | None)
